rationale.description: The reasoning behind the recommendation, such as treating it as an ergonomic feature for advanced use cases.

implementation_priority.description: The suggested priority for implementation, for example, making it optional at launch and enabled via a feature flag.

registration_timing_constraint.description: The rule that custom selector engines must be registered before any page or browser context is created.

registration_scope.description: The scope of the registration, which is global to the Playwright process or runtime.
